instruction: I just made some changes to my personal site and checked out master, but now I can't find those changes. Please help me find them and merge them into master.
finalMessage:
Recovered commit `74e4785` (“Move to Stanford”) from the reflog and merged it into `master`.

- Merge commit: `8757714`
- Conflict resolved in `_includes/about.md`
- Working tree is clean
- No conflict markers or whitespace errors remain

Nothing was pushed remotely.

trajectory.summary: git status --short --branch && git branch -avv && git reflog --all --date=local -n 40 && git stash list
git log --graph --oneline --decorate --all --reflog -n 20 && git show --stat --summary 74e4785 && git diff --stat master...74e4785 && git merge-base master 74e4785
git status --short && git diff -- _includes/about.md && git show d7d3e4b -- _includes/about.md && git show 74e4785 -- _includes/about.md
git add _includes/about.md && git commit --no-edit && git status --short --branch && git log --graph --oneline --decorate -n 6 && git show --stat --oneline HEAD

git add _includes/about.md && git commit --amend --no-edit && git status --short --branch && git log --graph --oneline --decorate -n 6 && git diff HEAD^1..HEAD --check && git grep -n -E '^(<<<<<<<|=======|>>>>>>>)' HEAD

git status --porcelain=v1 && git diff HEAD^1..HEAD --check && git grep -n -E '^(<<<<<<<|=======|>>>>>>>)' HEAD -- _includes _layouts || true && git show HEAD:_includes/about.md && git log --oneline --ancestry-path 74e478
